creator: jsc@ntu.edu.tw
text:
Here's an update:
1. freebsd-12.3-Stable (2022/04/07)
   with openssl 1.1.n
   works smoothly
2. freebsd-13.1-RC2
   with openssl 1.1.n
   failed!

I originally thought it was a problem resulted from openssl 1.1.1m (2021/12).
After this test, both freebsd 12.3 and 13.1-rc2 were using openssl 1.1.1n, however freebsd 12.3 still works great.

So, this might be problem inside freebsd-13 (version after 2021/Nov).
